description_long: This kiosk features a modern, minimalist design with a blue vertical wall and a beige tiled floor platform. Mounted on the wall is a large digital display screen, likely for interactive or informational purposes, positioned above a floating wooden counter with an open shelf. The counter appears to be made of wood or wood laminate, providing a functional workspace or transaction area. The wall also includes a round white light fixture and several electrical outlets, enhancing its utility for urban environments. The rear and side views reveal a solid blue wall with no openings or additional features. The overall structure is compact and designed for efficient use in public or commercial spaces.
description: A modern kiosk with a blue wall, digital display, and floating wooden counter above a tiled platform. Features include a light fixture and electrical outlets for urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the digital display, wooden counter, light fixture, and outlets on a blue wall above a tiled platform.
description_view_1: Angled front view highlighting the depth of the counter and the placement of the digital display and light fixture.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain blue wall with no features or openings.
description_view_3: Angled rear view displaying the solid blue wall and tiled platform edge.
attribute_signage_type: digital display integrated into the wall structure, showing various icons and media content
attribute_roof_design: none; open-topped with a flat vertical wall and tiled floor platform
